tours.title: Ol Pejeta Conservancy Day Trip
tours.description: Spend a day at Ol Pejeta Conservancy, home to the last two Northern White Rhinos and the largest Black Rhino sanctuary in East Africa.

tours.title: Mt Kilimambogo Hike
tours.description: Conquer Mt Kilimambogo (Ol Donyo Sabuk) on an exciting day hike with stunning views, team building activities, and refreshments.

tours.title: Ngare Ndare Forest Adventure
tours.description: Explore the stunning Ngare Ndare Forest with its famous canopy walkway, blue pools, and waterfalls on this action-packed day trip.

tours.title: Tembea Suswa / Ngong Tunnel Train Trip
tours.description: Ride the SGR through East Africa's longest tunnel and enjoy a scenic day out with food, team building, and incredible views of Ngong Hills and Mt Longonot.

tours.title: Olkaria Geothermal Spa Day Trip
tours.description: Unwind at Olkaria Geothermal Spa with naturally heated pools, team building activities, and a scenic lunch by Lake Naivasha.

tours.title: WRC Rally Experience
tours.description: Experience the thrill of the WRC Safari Rally finals with transport, access to the rally stages, refreshments, and unforgettable motorsport action.
